content: Android ANDROID_ID (Settings.Secure.ANDROID_ID) is scoped per-app AND per-user since Android 8.0 (API 26). Two different apps on the same device see DIFFERENT values, even if they want to use it as a shared device identifier. The value is stable across reinstalls if package name and signing key stay the same. Factory reset changes the value. This means: if the HealthAssistant ANDROID_ID was registered in backend HMAC_DEVICES_JSON, a new WalletAssistant app on the same device will get a DIFFERENT ANDROID_ID — requiring a separate device registration.
